resources.string: Are you sure you want to exit the app?
No movies found for these criteria!
You haven\'t created any folders yet
No content found in this category
We are creating your image to share
🏆 My total watch time on FlickTrove: %1$s of movies and TV shows! 🎬\nJoin me and track your progress: https://alle-0.github.io/FlickTrove/
📊 I watched %1$d movies and %2$d TV shows.\n
Shows a colored ribbon on cards to indicate folder membership.
Shows colored badges with indicators like NEW, HOT, BEST, etc.
Shows a button to change the number of columns in Home
Separates released titles from upcoming ones in Home
In details, shows the original title logo instead of text, when available.
Choose the default screen on app launch
Customize the look of the app
Changes the app icon on the home screen to match the accent color
Shows the logo animation when opening the app
Uses pitch black instead of dark gray
Get notified on the release day of the movies or series you follow.
%1$s Frees up space used by posters and backdrops
Smart Merge will combine data while always protecting your local ratings and notes.
Trakt, Letterboxd, IMDb, TVTime, All CSV/JSON
Retrieve missing data for older movies in your library. Use only if strictly necessary (intensive background operation).

This operation will download missing data in the background for all old saved movies. It requires an active internet connection and performs numerous cloud operations.

Run it ONLY if you notice that essential information like cast or runtime is missing from your old saves.

Are you sure you want to proceed?
Report bugs or suggest new features
This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
Additional data and ratings provided by OMDb API.
Sync and stats powered by Trakt.tv.
Are you sure you want to proceed? All your saved movies, ratings, and folders will be permanently removed from the cloud.
All downloaded posters and logos will be removed. They will need to be reloaded on the next startup.
Are you sure you want to log out? You will need to log in again to sync your data.
Coming soon or New episodes released
Low budget, high quality (budget < 5 mln, avg =7.0)
Love it or hate it (avg 5.0 - 6.5, >1000 votes)
Export a copy of your data (favorites, folders, and settings) or restore from a previously saved file.

Import your watch history from any platform or site! You can upload exports from Trakt.tv, Letterboxd, IMDb, TVTime, Serializd, or any custom CSV/JSON file containing titles, IDs, or release years. FlickTrove\'s smart engine will automatically detect format and match your movies and TV shows!
Import your Yamtrack library or export in Yamtrack CSV format (TMDB sources only).
The translation model (about 30MB) might not be downloaded yet. Allow downloading over cellular data?
Unable to load data. Check your connection and try again.
No results found.\nType at least 3 characters
No results found.\nTry simplifying your search
Note: the keyword filter is ignored in text search.
We don\'t have enough data to recommend anything yet.
Add movies to your favorites and rate them to get started!
You\'ve seen all current recommendations. Try switching from MOVIES to TV SHOWS or reload to find new ones!
Don\'t have an account? Sign Up
Already have an account? Log In
By continuing, you agree to our
By continuing as a guest, your data will only be saved locally on this device. If you uninstall the app or clear its data, everything will be lost.
Logging into an existing account will replace your current guest data with the data from that account.
Creating a new account will permanently save and transfer all your current guest data to it.
How much time do you have?
What mood are you looking for?
Select a highlighted day on the calendar
\"%1$s\" is now available! Tap to discover more.
Are you sure you want to delete
Are you sure you want to delete the folder
THIS ACTION IS IRREVERSIBLE AND WILL ONLY REMOVE THE ORGANIZATION, NOT THE SAVED CONTENT.
Risk of data loss if you uninstall the app.
Audio is saved locally and will not be synced.
Data is sourced from the MPAA (USA), the international standard for film classification.
FlickTrove displays this information to help you choose the right movie for your evening.
You can send another feedback in about %1$d hours
Error sending feedback. Please try again later.
No account found with this email.
Email already registered. Please log in.
Sensitive operation. Please log in again.
Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
Manage the reminder on the detail page
Manage episodes on the detail page
No news available at the moment.
Unable to load news. Check your internet connection and try again.
All ages admitted. Nothing that would offend parents for viewing by children.
Some material may not be suitable for children. Parents urged to give "parental guidance".
Some material may be inappropriate for children under 13.
Under 17 requires accompanying parent or adult guardian.
This program contains some material that many parents would find unsuitable for children under 14 years of age.
This program is specifically designed to be viewed by adults and therefore may be unsuitable for children under 17.
Long press an episode for more info
Connection to Trakt failed. Please try again.
No connection or artist data not cached.\nConnect to the internet to download full biography and filmography.
Full biographical data and extended filmography are not available in offline mode.\nTitles present in your local library are displayed below.

• New Glassmorphic UI with real-time Haze Blur effects • App update badge cleanly integrated in Menu & Settings • Smart notification and reminder system for Movies & TV Shows • Overall performance improvements and stability fixes
A new version of FlickTrove is available on GitHub! You are currently running v%1$s. Update now to get all the latest features, improvements, and bug fixes.
New version v%1$s available on GitHub →
